sglang.title: Split local attention test from fa3 test
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
test_fa3.py contains 7 tests, but only 1 of them needs to be run on 8 GPUs.
This PR splits test_fa3.py into test_fa3.py(on 1 GPU) and test_local_attn.py(on 8 GPUs). So the resource of 8-GPU CI machine can be less wasted.
@merrymercy  @hebiao064

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code

sglang.title: [Misc] add structure logging, write to file and log tracing for SGL R…
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR implements logging for the SGL Router using the tracing. The logging system provides structured logs with timestamps, context information, and configurable log levels.

Structured logging with multiple log levels (TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
Simultaneous logging to console a

sglang.title: Improve overlap scheduling
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When doing overlap scheduling, two events copy_done and launch_done are waited at the same time. However, the launch_done may be incorrectly assigned.
Modification
For each batch to run, make launch_done one of its members and pass the current scheduling batch's launch_done to resolve_bat

sglang.title: Add Cutlass MLA attention backend
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Enables use of the blackwell cutlass MLA decode kernel with deepseek models.
Modifications
Adds "cutlass_mla" option for attention backend.
Deepseek-R1 Benchmarks
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --host 0.0.0.0 --port 30000 --tp 8 --model-path deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1 --trust-remote-code --

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Get a specific type of layer from forward context
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Forward context saves both Attention and FusedMOE layers. Add an interface to only get one type of layer from forward context.
Fix bug:
VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHINFER python3 examples/offline_inference/data_parallel.py --model="Qwen/Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B-Chat" --dp-size=2 --tp-size=1
(EngineCore_0 pi

vllm.title: [MISC] Use string annotation types for class definitions
vllm.author: jianzs
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This change replamces explicit class definitions with string annotations for type hints, simplifying the import structure and avoiding circular dependencies. The modification maintains the original functionality while improving code readability and reducing potential import-related issues.

vllm.title: [Misc] Change buckets of histogram_iteration_tokens to [1, 8, 16, 32, 64, 128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8096] to represent number of tokens
vllm.author: sfc-gh-zhwang

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Lora Name Parsing
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, we assume lora weights start with base_model.model. and split the prefix of lora weights accordingly. This is usually true, but in some situations, there may be lora adapters that don't have this prefix. An example of such a model is granite speech 3.3, where the audio specific lora weigh

vllm.title: [NVIDIA] Support Cutlass MLA for Blackwell GPUs
vllm.author: kaixih
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The latest cutlass supports MLA for the blackwell GPUs. Examples can be found here. It should be available in the next release (v3.9).
This PR integrates this kernel as ops.cutlass_mla_decode.
cc. @kushanam

vllm.title: [Feature] support sequence parallelism using compilation pass
vllm.author: cascade812
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR support sequence parallelism using below compilation config
config = CompilationConfig(
    level=3,
    custom_ops=["+rms_norm"],
    compile_sizes=[4, 8, 16],
    splitting_ops=[],
)
config.pass_config.enable_sequence_parallelism= True

llm = LLM(model="llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct",

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix missing ARG in Dockerfile for arm64 platforms
vllm.author: lkm-schulz
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The target vllm-openai-base uses the $TARGETPLATFORM variable to modify which version of bitsandbytes is installed based on the platform. However, the Dockerfile does not specify ARG TARGETPLATFORM for this target. When using Podman, the environment variable is thus not set and the build fails for l

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix cutlass dispatch for fp8/int8 to properly invoke M<=16 c…
vllm.author: Ther-LF
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixed a bug where cutlass dispatch for fp8 and int8 couldn't invoke the M<=16 config.
Changes

Fixed the condition check for fp8/int8 dispatch to properly handle M<=16 cases
Ensured the correct kernel config is selected for small matrix sizes

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Mistral3 spatial merge error
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #16675
We just were not patching spatial_merge_size into the vision config in both of the places needed. This results in the dummy inputs having the right spatial_merge_size being applied but actual inferences were missing it, causing the shapes to mismatch during inference.
Here is where is it

vllm.bodyExcerpt: As there is partial_rotary_factor parameter in get_rope method, which is used to calculate rotary_dim, we do not need to calculate out of the get_rope method.
